rogue_eye.title: Craft the Rogue Eye when all ingredients are assembled (see eye_recipes.js for full recipe)

place_rogue.title: Place the Rogue Eye in the End Portal frame

subtitle.text: The fifth frame slot. Seven remaining. The portal is patient.

description: The Rogue Eye is in the frame.
The Engineers designed the portal system.
They knew what it cost. They built it anyway.
The Rogue Eye is their self-assessment:
not chaos — order that has been misapplied.
Their inheritance is in your portal now.
You carry them forward whether you intended to or not.
→ Place it in the End Portal frame [check]
